biography:
Carolina Oliva, an actress and model, began her career on Canal 13's program "Venga Conmigo," where she appeared between 1995 and 2002. However, she had already made appearances on Sabado Gigante's "Clan Infantil" in 1989.

Her debut in cinema came in 2003 in the successful film "Sexo con Amor."

She has acted in various television productions such as "El cuento del tio," "Infieles," and "Teatro en Chilevision," as well as the series "JPT: Justicia para Todos," "La vida es una loteria," "Versus," "Quiero si tu quieres," and "Fortunato," among others.

Additionally, she appeared in the telenovela "Montecristo" and participated in the program "Morande con Compañia."

Showcasing her sensuality in "Infieles," "Teatro en Chilevision," and others, she participated in the third season of the program "Fiebre de Baile."
name: Carolina Oliva
